name: Faux Marble and Metal Console Table Gold - Threshold™: Sleek Two-Tiered, Rectangular Design, 30" High
description:
Add stylish flair and functionality to your space with this Faux-Marble and Metal Accent Table from Threshold™. With a two-tiered rectangular silhouette on six sleek legs, this accent table looks stunning with its white faux-marble shelves and gleaming gold-tone metal frame. The long, rectangular open shelves provide ample display space for decor, books, photo frame or plants, elevating the overall aesthetic of your room.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
